- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [ ] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Full-stack dialer application created with React frontend and Node.js backend
  - Google Sheets integration for lead data management
  - Google SSO login functionality
  - All requested features implemented

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Backend Express server created
  - React frontend scaffolded
  - Project structure organized

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Google OAuth authentication implemented
  - Google Sheets API integration complete
  - Lead management interface built
  - Notes system with timestamps
  - Disposition tracking (No Answer, Not Interested, More Info, Meeting Booked)
  - Lead locking mechanism
  - Call tracking with dates
  - Company and contact information display
  - Responsive styling

- [ ] Install Required Extensions
  - No additional extensions required for development

- [ ] Compile the Project
  - Backend: npm dependencies ready to install
  - Frontend: React build system ready
  - Node modules need to be installed

- [ ] Create and Run Task
  - Backend runs on port 5000
  - Frontend runs on port 3000
  - Both services ready to start

- [ ] Launch the Project
  - Ready for development launch with npm

- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created with setup and usage instructions
  - Environment variable examples provided
  - API documentation included
